expectations.text: Recommends a specific workspace manager (pnpm, npm, or yarn) with reasoning
expectations.evidence: Recommends pnpm with reasoning: 'deterministic installs and better workspace linking'

expectations.text: Recommends a specific orchestrator (Turborepo or Nx) with reasoning for this scale
expectations.evidence: Recommends Turborepo with reasoning: 'lower migration friction than Nx when you already know your tools'

expectations.text: Provides actual pnpm-workspace.yaml or equivalent config content
Provides turbo.json or nx.json pipeline/task config content
Includes CI workflow snippet with affected-only builds
Mentions migration strategy for preserving git history
expectations.evidence: Mentions git subtree and git filter-repo, though simple copy is the primary suggestion

expectations.text: Mentions remote caching (Vercel Remote Cache or Nx Cloud)
expectations.evidence: Turborepo remote cache section with TURBO_TOKEN/TURBO_TEAM env vars
